tasks.a_code:
(set input string $0)
(set len int (len input))
(set result string "")
(for i 0 len
  (set char string (slice input i 1))
  (if (and (in char "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ") (eq (% i 2) 0))
    (set result (join result (upper char)))
    (if (and (in char "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ") (eq (% i 2) 1))
      (set result (join result (lower char)))
      (set result (join result char)))))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:
(set input $0)
(set result "")
(set upper true)

(for-each c char input
  (if (and upper (or (ge (string_get c 0) 65) (le (string_get c 0) 90)) (or (ge (string_get c 0) 97) (le (string_get c 0) 122)))
    (set result (add result (upper c)))
    (set upper false))
  (if (and (not upper) (or (ge (string_get c 0) 65) (le (string_get c 0) 90)) (or (ge (string_get c 0) 97) (le (string_get c 0) 122)))
    (set result (add result (lower c)))
    (set upper true))
  (if (not (or (ge (string_get c 0) 65) (le (string_get c 0) 90)) (or (ge (string_get c 0) 97) (le (string_get c 0) 122)))
    (set result (add result c))))

(println result)

rag_hits.desc: Read a string and print it reversed.
Rotate a string by N positions.
Read a string from the first CLI arg and print whether every character is a letter.
Read a string and print it with all digits removed.
Write a Sigil program that implements uppercase.

tasks.a_code:
(set input string $0)
(set result string "")
(set prev char (first input))
(set count int 1)

(for-each ch char (slice input 1)
  (if (eq ch prev)
    (set count (add count 1))
    (begin
      (set result (fmt "{}{}" result prev count))
      (set prev ch)
      (set count 1))))

(set result (fmt "{}{}" result prev count))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set cs (chars s))
(set n (len cs))
(set out "")
(set i 0)
(while (lt i n)
  (set c (array_get cs i))
  (set count 1)
  (set j (add i 1))
  (while (and (lt j n) (eq (array_get cs j) c))
    (set count (add count 1))
    (set j (add j 1)))
  (set out (fmt "{}{}" out c count))
  (set i j))
(println out)

rag_hits.desc: Write a Sigil program that implements run length encode.

Write a Sigil test that verifies: encode empty string.

tasks.a_code:
(set nums array (split $0 " "))
(set k int #1)
(set len int (len nums))
(set rotated array (slice nums k len))
(push rotated (slice nums 0 k))
(println (join rotated " "))
tasks.b_code:
(set nums (split $0 " "))
(set k #1)
(set len (len nums))
(set k (mod k len))
(set rotated (slice nums k))
(set rotated (push rotated (slice nums 0 k)))
(println (join rotated " "))

rag_hits.desc: Bubble-sort space-separated integers and print them space-separated.
Read a space-separated list of words from the first CLI arg and group anagrams together.
Binary-search a sorted space-separated int array (arg1) for a target (arg2). Print the 0-based index or -1.
Read a space-separated list of numbers and print their mean as a float.
Remove duplicate integers from a space-separated list, preserving order.

tasks.a_code:
(set num int #0)
(fn digital_root n int -> int
  (if (lt n 10) (ret n))
  (set sum int 0)
  (for-each digit int (split (str n) "")
    (set sum (add sum digit)))
  (ret (digital_root sum)))
(println (digital_root num))
tasks.b_code:
(set n #0)
(while (ge n 10)
  (set s 0)
  (while (gt n 0)
    (set s (add s (mod n 10)))
    (set n (div n 10)))
  (set n s))
(println n)
tasks.a_stderr: Runtime error: Type mismatch in for-each: variable 'digit' declared as int but got string

tasks.a_code:
(set sentence string $0)
(set letter string $1)
(set words array (split sentence " "))
(set count int 0)
(for-each word string words
  (if (and (gt (len word) 0) (eq (first word) letter))
    (set count (add count 1))))
(println count)
tasks.b_code:
(set sentence $0)
(set letter $1)
(set words (split sentence " "))
(set count 0)
(for-each word words (\w 
  (if (string_equals (first w) letter)
    (set count (+ count 1)))))
(println count)

(set sorted_nums array (sort_by nums (\(a b) (gt a b))))
(set result int (array_get sorted_nums (sub k 1)))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:

(set k #1)
(set sorted (sort_by nums (>)))
(println (array_get sorted (sub k 1)))

tasks.a_code:

(set sum int 0)
(for-each i int (range 1 (+ n 1))
  (set sum (+ sum (* i i))))
(println sum)

(set sum 0)
(for i 1 (+ n 1)

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set char_count map {})
(for-each c string s
  (set count int (if (in c char_count) (get char_count c) 0))
  (set char_count (assoc char_count c (add count 1))))
(set result int -1)
(for-each \(c i) enumerate s
  (when (eq (get char_count c) 1)
    (set result i)
    (break)))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set char_count (counter s))
(set result -1)
(for-each i int (range 0 (len s))
  (if (eq (get char_count (string_get s i)) 1)
    (set result i)
    (break)))
(println result)
tasks.a_stderr: Runtime error: for-each requires an array or map

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set max_depth int 0)
(set current_depth int 0)

(for-each ch string s
  (if (eq ch "(")
    (set current_depth (add current_depth 1))
    (if (eq ch ")")
      (set current_depth (sub current_depth 1))))
  (set max_depth (max max_depth current_depth)))

(println max_depth)
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set depth 0)
(set max_d 0)
(for-each c (chars s)
  (cond
    ((eq c "(") (set depth (add depth 1)) (if (gt depth max_d) (set max_d depth)))
    ((eq c ")") (set depth (sub depth 1)))))
(println max_d)
tasks.a_stderr: Runtime error: for-each requires an array or map

rag_hits.desc: Write a Sigil program that implements max nesting depth.

tasks.a_code:
(set csv string $0)
(set col_name string $1)
(set lines array (split csv "\n"))
(set header array (split (first lines) ","))
(set col_index int (index_of header col_name))
(set values array (map_arr (rest lines) (\line (str_to_int (nth (split line ",") col_index)))))
(set total int (reduce values + 0))
(println total)
tasks.b_code:
(set csv $0)
(set column_name $1)

(fn parse_csv s string -> array
  (map_arr (split s "\n") (\line (split line ","))))

(set rows (parse_csv csv))
(set header (first rows))
(set data (rest rows))

(fn index_of arr array key string -> int
  (reduce (enumerate arr) (\(acc \(i v)) (if (eq v key) i acc)) -1))

(set col_index (index_of header column_name))

(fn sum_column rows array col_index int -> int
  (sum (map_arr rows (\row (int (nth row col_index))))))

(set total (sum_column data col_index))
(println total)
tasks.b_stderr: Parse error: Expected lambda param or ')' but got (
